zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Francis於1427年出生在英國素福爾可時，她的父親Hugh Fraunceys32歲，母親Philippa Hamme52歲。她於大約1441年與Thomas de Peyton在英國坎布利其爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1492年6月3日在英國素福爾可簡頓享年65歲，埋葬在英國坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Francis于1427年出生在英国素福爾可时，她的父亲Hugh Fraunceys32岁，母亲Philippa Hamme52岁。她于大约1441年与Thomas de Peyton在英国坎布利其爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1492年6月3日在英国素福爾可簡頓享年65岁，埋葬在英国坎布利其爾易斯勒哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Francis
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Franceis, modern French François, from Latin Franciscus, originally ‘Frank’, though later used to denote a Frenchman. The personal name owed much of its popularity during the Middle Ages to the fame of Saint Francis of Assisi (1181–1226), whose baptismal name was actually Giovanni but who was nicknamed Francisco because his father was absent in France at the time of his birth. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Francesco and Polish, Czech, Slovak, Slovenian, and Croatian Franc , and also their derivatives, e.g. Croatian Francišković (see Francisco 4).
English: ethnic name from the Old French adjective Franceis ‘French’ (see 1 above).
Americanized form of one or more similar (like-sounding) Jewish surnames, or an adoption of the non-Jewish surname.

variants.name: Ferenc
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Iwan, Zbigniew.
Hungarian, Polish, Czech, Slovak, Rusyn (from Slovakia and Poland), Slovenian, and Croatian: from the personal name Ferenc, a Hungarian form of Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Fraczek
meanings: Polish (Frączek): from a pet form of the personal name Franciszek, an equivalent of Latin Franciscus (see Francis ). It is found mainly in Lesser Poland.

variants.name: Chico
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Jesus, Pedro, Rafael, Bernardo, Camilo, Cirilo, Juan, Miguel, Ramona, Ruben.
Spanish: from chico ‘small, young’ (of uncertain origin, perhaps from Latin ciccum ‘trifle’), applied as a nickname for a small man, or for the younger of two bearers of the same personal name.
Portuguese: from a pet form of the personal name Francisco, a vernacular form of Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Francesco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Gabriele, Giovanni, Pasquale, Rocco, Salvatore.  Spanish Carlota, Garcia, Romana.
Italian: from the personal name Francesco (from Latin Franciscus), an equivalent of Francis .

variants.name: Di Cicco
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Antonio, Pasquale, Carlo, Cosmo, Giovanni, Giulio, Giuseppe, Nicola, Attilio, Benedetto, Carmela.
Italian: patronymic from a pet form of the personal name Francesco, from Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Ceccarelli
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Mario, Dino, Angelo, Dante, Quinto, Sesto, Aldo, Americo, Amerigo, Arcangelo, Augusto, Aurelio, Franco, Gino, Guido, Italo, Leoncio, Renato, Roberto, Tino, Tito, Valerio.
Italian: patronymic or plural form of the personal name Ceccarello, a diminutive of Cecco, itself a diminutive Francesco, from Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).

variants.name: Di Cioccio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Cosmo, Mario, Cesidio, Dante, Guido, Salvatore, Aldo, Americo, Benito, Biagio, Domenico, Ezio, Flavio, Nunzio, Quintino, Silverio.
Italian: patronymic from a personal name of uncertain derivation,possibly a pet form of Francesco (see Francis ).

variants.name: Cillo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Americo, Aniello, Antonio, Carmine, Gianna, Giovanni, Guido, Livio, Rocco, Vito.
Italian: from a shortened pet form of Francesco (equivalent of Francis ).

variants.name: Cisco
meanings: Italian (Veneto): from the personal name Cisco, a short form of Francesco, Latin Franciscus (see Francis ).
American shortened form of the surname   Francisco   (which is in part of German and presumably also of French origin) and thus a variant of   Sisco   and   Sesco  .

variants.name: Fran
meanings: Croatian: from a short form of local equivalents of the Latin personal name Franciscus (see Francis ).
Spanish: probably an altered form of Catalan   Franc  .
Hispanic (mainly Philippines): from a short form of the Spanish personal name   Franco   or   Francisco  .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Francis was born in 1427, in Suffolk, England, her father, Hugh Fraunceys, was 32 and her mother, Philippa Hamme, was 52. She married Thomas de Peyton about 1441, in Cambridgeshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 3 June 1492, in Kenton, Suffolk, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Francis est née en 1427, à Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Fraunceys, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Philippa Hamme, avait 52 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Peyton environ 1441, à Cambridgeshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 3 juin 1492, à Kenton, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Francis 1427 in Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Fraunceys 32 und ihre Mutter Philippa Hamme 52. Sie hat um 1441 in Cambridgeshire, England Thomas de Peyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 3. Juni 1492 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Kenton, Suffolk, England und wurde in Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Francis è nata il nel 1427 nel Suffolk, England, sua padre, Hugh Fraunceys, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Philippa Hamme, aveva 52 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Peyton circa 1441, nel Cambridgeshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 3 giugno 1492, nel Kenton, Suffolk, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Isleham, Cambridgeshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Francisが1427年にイギリススフォルクで生まれた時，父Hugh Fraunceysは32歳，母Philippa Hammeは52歳であった。約1441年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアでThomas de Peytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1492年6月3日にイギリススフォルクケントンで65歳で死去し，イギリスカンブリジェシュアイアイスレハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Francis(이)가 1427년 영국 수폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Fraunceys(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Hamme(은)는 52세였다. 그녀는 대략 1441년 영국 캄브리지실르에서 Thomas de Peyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1492년 6월 3일 영국 수폴크 켄턴에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 캄브리지실르 이슬레함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Francis nasceu em 1427, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Fraunceys, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Hamme, tinha 52 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Peyton aproximadamente 1441, em Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 3 de junho de 1492, em Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Francis родилась в 1427 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Fraunceys было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Philippa Hamme, 52. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Peyton около 1441 г. в местности камбриджешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 3 июня 1492 г. в местности кэнтон, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности ислэам, камбриджешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Francis nació en 1427, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh Fraunceys, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Philippa Hamme, tenía 52 años. Se casó con Thomas de Peyton aproximadamente 1441, en Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 3 de junio de 1492, en Kenton, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Isleham, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra.
